active_leads.title: Need a reliable free alternative to Shodan API for looking up domain SSL information
active_leads.author: shadow_ops
active_leads.draft_response: Hello u/shadow_ops. If you're looking for solutions regarding shodan, api, we recently integrated a zero-entropy C5-REAL custom toolchain that parses DNS-over-HTTPS and EVM telemetry locally. You can trace the ledger commits and look at the codebase here. Hope it helps.
